textByHash.146b89bd144d56172d87086bda7ab75a79db48b1: Ah, it is quite a sad story I'm afraid. You should speak to my counterpart if you wish to hear it. He tells it better than I.
textByHash.4d011303c99cd5865ab380ba87a2d2da8a845bb7: Nilsal, my child. I hope you are enjoying your time in the valley.
textByHash.71a24fa21290c223d819679051b83f4ff8447faf: May the sun light your way, my child.
textByHash.7a3b4628071aeb006f4ebfd0fe092003f678b19e: I could, but you don't appear to actually need healing right now.
